summary: R.3 Testing Complete - Pricing Settings UI successfully moved from Projects edit dialog to Properties toolbar. All features verified: (1) 'Площообразуване' section removed from Projects edit dialog, (2) New 'Площообразуване' button added as FIRST button in Properties toolbar with Settings icon, (3) Button opens Dialog with PricingSettingsTab component, (4) Role gating working - button NOT visible for sales users, only for super_admin, (5) All R.2 features (inline €/м² edit, BulkApply, PropertiesSummary footer) working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: AdminProjects.jsx (357 lines): PricingSettingsTab import and usage correctly removed from edit dialog
AdminProperties.jsx (1251 lines): Settings icon, PricingSettingsTab, useIsSuperAdmin imports added correctly
AdminProperties.jsx: pricingDialogOpen state and isSuperAdmin local var added correctly
AdminProperties.jsx: Pricing toolbar button with role gating (isSuperAdmin &&) positioned as FIRST button in toolbar
AdminProperties.jsx: New Dialog with PricingSettingsTab placed between BulkApplyDialog and edit Dialog
PricingSettingsTab.jsx: Component unchanged, reused without modifications
Button disabled state: Correctly disabled when !projectId (no project selected)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data. Used existing Хаджи Димитър project with 52 properties.
context_for_next_testing_agent: R.3 fully tested. Pricing Settings UI moved from Projects → Properties. Key test points: (1) Projects edit dialog NO LONGER has 'Площообразуване' section, (2) Properties toolbar has new 'Площообразуване' button as FIRST button with Settings icon, (3) Button opens Dialog with full PricingSettingsTab (base_price_per_sqm, vat_rate, floor_corrections, type_overrides), (4) Role gating: button visible ONLY for super_admin, NOT for sales, (5) Button disabled when no project selected, (6) All R.2 features (inline €/м² edit, BulkApply, PropertiesSummary footer) continue working.
